# Darshit Radadiya — AI Engineer

> Darshit Radadiya is an AI Engineer from Ahmedabad, India, building real-world AI solutions specializing in Agentic AI Systems, RAG Pipelines, LLMs, Voice Agents, and Automation.

## About

Darshit Radadiya is a Computer Engineering graduate from LJ University, Ahmedabad. He is an AI Engineer who designs and builds production-ready intelligent applications. His core expertise includes multi-agent orchestration with LangGraph, advanced RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines using Qdrant and LangChain, real-time voice AI agents, and backend systems with FastAPI.

## Skills & Technologies

- **AI Frameworks:** LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI
- **Large Language Models:** OpenAI GPT-4, Google Gemini, Llama 3, fine-tuned models
- **Vector Databases:** Qdrant, pgvector, Pinecone
- **Backend:** FastAPI, Django, Flask, Python
- **Specializations:** Agentic AI Systems, RAG Pipelines, Voice AI Agents, Multi-Agent Orchestration, NLP, Automation
- **Infrastructure:** Docker, AWS, MLOps, CI/CD

## Projects

- AI Chatbot Development — RAG-based conversational AI with retrieval-augmented generation for context-aware responses grounded in custom business data using LangChain, LlamaIndex, Qdrant, and FastAPI.
- Agentic AI Systems — Multi-agent orchestration with LangGraph designing autonomous AI agents that reason, plan, and collaborate to solve complex multi-step tasks.
- API & Backend Development — High-performance production-ready REST APIs built with FastAPI, Django, and Flask to serve as robust backends for scalable AI applications.
- Voice AI Agents — Real-time voice AI systems combining Speech-to-Text, agent reasoning, and Text-to-Speech for automated customer interactions.

## Education

- Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering from LJ University, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
